1f3eef73-6e06-48fa-8db0-854233642b0f.Text: The Master Tactician suffers {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} equal to 10% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}, gains twice the Master Tactician's {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} stacks of tactical advantage, and resets the {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g} of Linchpin, Inspire, and Strongpoint. Until the end of the Master Tactician's turn, these abilities can only target the Master Tactician themselves and their attacks will not expend MP. The Master Tactician will also gain +2 AP and +{uip|MoveBonus|305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6} MP, and can make an extra attack this turn.

2c980c71-a981-4e79-bcab-ba5108749ee6.Text: At the beginning of the Master Tactician's turn, if their {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} is higher than 75, the first {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} attack or {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attack{/g} used by the Master Tactician this turn costs −1 less {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}action point{/g} (minimum 0).
